full_text:
Cao Jiong 曹冏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Jiong (曹冏). First son of Cao Rui. Prince of Qinghe. Died the year he was born. Cao Jiong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Jiong lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
